uls-desc: Waxay siisaa isticmaalaha dhowr hab oo uu ku doorto luqad uguna habeeyo dejimaha luqadda
ext-uls-undo-language-tooltip-text-local: Luqadda wiki-kan waa la beddelay. Hubi [[Special:GlobalPreferences|dookhyadaada guud]] si aad luqadda ugu beddesho dhammaan wiki-yada.
uls-betafeature-desc: Muuji nooc gaaban oo liiska luqadaha ah, oo leh kaliya luqadaha adiga kuu khuseeya badan.
ext-uls-display-settings-desc: Deji luqadda loo isticmaalo menu-yada iyo faraha qoraalka.
ext-uls-language-buttons-help: Beddel luqadda menu-yada. Luqadda nuxurka saameyn kuma yeelan doonto.
ext-uls-display-settings-anon-log-in-cta: [[Special:UserLogin|Soo gal]] si aad u doorato luqad kale oo menu-yada ah.
ext-uls-webfonts-settings-title: Soo dejiso faraha qoraalka marka loo baahdo
ext-uls-webfonts-settings-info: Si otomaatig ah u soo dejiso faraha qoraalka ee maqan oo oggolow in la doorto faraha qoraalka ee la doorbido.
ext-uls-webfonts-select-for-ui-info: Far qoraal ah oo loo isticmaalo is dhexgalka isticmaalaha
ext-uls-webfonts-select-for-content-info: Far qoraal ah oo loo isticmaalo nuxurka
ext-uls-input-settings-noime: Ma jiraan habab gelin oo diyaar u ah luqaddan.
ext-uls-input-disable-notification-info-: Waxaad wakhti kasta awood u yeelan kartaa inaad ka hawlgeliso qalabka gelinta adigoo ka isticmaalaya dejimaha luqadda.
Waxaad wakhti kasta awood u yeelan kartaa inaad ka hawlgeliso qalabka gelinta adigoo ka isticmaalaya dejimaha luqadda ee ku xiga liiska luqadaha.
ext-uls-compact-link-info: Dhammaan luqadaha (xulashada bilowga ah ee laga soo xulay luqadaha caanka ah ee adiga iyo kuwa kale)
ext-uls-compact-no-results: Boggan lagama heli karo luqadda aad raadinaysay.
ext-uls-setlang-error: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la cusboonaysiinayay luqadda aad doorbidayso. Khalad: $1
ext-uls-setlang-message: Xiriirkii aad raacday wuxuu codsaday in is-dhexgalka lagu muujiyo $1 ($2)
ext-uls-setlang-heading: Ma rabtaa inaad beddesho luqadda is dhexgalka?
ext-uls-empty-state-desc: Hadda ma jiraan luqado la heli karo
ext-uls-empty-state-header-actions-avail: Weli ma jiraan luqado. Ma rabtaa inaad ku darto mid cusub?
ext-uls-empty-state-desc-actions-availab: Ka dhig nuxurka mid lagu heli karo luqado badan.
